report_summary.desc: Report a slice of compile progress (pages produced / contradictions auto-merged / pending), one sentence to one paragraph.

propose_plan.desc: Call after Plan-phase alignment: submit a short, readable, reviewable compile plan (the plan argument, markdown) for the owner's approval, then stop and wait. Do not write candidate/ pages before approval arrives.
propose_plan.ack: Plan submitted to the owner (the UI now shows the plan and the approve control); awaiting approval. Do not write candidate/ pages until the approval message arrives.
propose_plan.reminder: (Reminder: while you are at it, maintain the candidate-page list as `- [ ] page — one line` in the ## Next Pages section of authoring/PLAN.md as your working state, to make progress easy to track; this does not affect the plan you just submitted.)

resolve_ticket.desc: Call once per contradiction ticket you have patched (one call per ticket, no batching): register which ticket (ticket_id), the value you applied (applied_value), the candidate files you actually edited (pages_edited — must cover the ticket's affected_pages), and a one-line note. This marks the ticket as patched and writes an auditable agent_report — the basis for the contradiction view showing 'AI patched' for the owner to verify.

propose_questions.desc: Call after compiling finishes (candidate/index.md written, self-audit done): submit 3-5 test questions for the owner to probe the knowledge base. questions is an array; each item {question: a single-fact question, reference: reference answer (≤150 chars), source: raw provenance}. Append-only: repeated calls dedup-merge by question text into authoring/QUESTIONS_PROPOSED.json and never overwrite the owner's prior picks.
propose_questions.summary: Prepared {added} test question(s) (skipped {skipped} duplicate(s)); {total} total awaiting the owner's selection.
propose_questions.registered: Questions registered: {added} added, {skipped} deduplicated, {total} total now (authoring/QUESTIONS_PROPOSED.json).
